name: O-11 bootstrap eval scenarios: --rule-id <id> with no fixtures emits a skipping notice and exits 0
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --run-bootstrap-evals --rule-id g-unknown-999 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'no bootstrap fixtures' err.txt && grep -q 'skipping' err.txt && echo skipped 1>&2
